cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog is holding a perfect "Fica" while another person tries to offer it a regular, boring biscuit. The dog ignores the biscuit and maintains its stay. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera is focused on the dog's unwavering gaze on its owner, completely ignoring the distraction.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The distraction is increased: another dog is playing with a squeaky toy nearby. The training dog looks at the toy for a second, but then re-focuses on its owner. The owner rewards the re-focus. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A thought bubble appears over the dog's head showing the squeaky toy, then it pops, and the dog's focus returns to the owner. A sparkle highlights the reward for making the right choice.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The ultimate test: the dog is holding a "Deixa" command over a pile of sausages on the floor. It is difficult, but the dog succeeds. Jackpot reward. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A dramatic, close-up shot of the dog drooling slightly but holding its position, showing immense self-control. A huge "Jackpot!" animation celebrates this master-level success.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A diagram showing a "Círculo de Confiança". The dog and owner are in the center. Distractions (toys, food, other dogs) are outside the circle and cannot break the focus. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The distractions animate, bouncing off an invisible barrier around the circle of trust, unable to penetrate it.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of a dog walking in a perfect heel position through a busy city square, completely unfazed by the chaos, its eyes locked on its owner. Text overlay: "Foco Inabalável, Conexão Inquebrável". 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A cinematic shot where the surrounding city chaos is in motion blur, creating a tunnel of focus between the dog and owner. The text appears with a solid, powerful font.
